title: 'We lost our home, not our identity' - Shakhtar eye European glory
summary: Shakhtar Donetsk faces Crystal Palace in the UEFA Conference League semi-final, aiming to bring pride to Ukraine amid ongoing conflict. The match represents an opportunity for the club to achieve European glory despite the challenges facing their nation.
content: Shakhtar Donetsk go into their Uefa Conference League semi-final tie against Crystal Palace on Thursday hoping to make their country proud.

zh.title: "我们失去了家园，但没有失去身份" - 沙赫塔尔眼望欧洲荣耀
zh.summary: 沙赫塔尔顿涅茨克在进行中的冲突中面对水晶宫参加欧足联欧洲联赛半决赛，旨在为乌克兰带来荣耀。这场比赛代表了俱乐部尽管面临国家挑战但仍能实现欧洲荣耀的机会。

title: Captain Thiago and triple Arsenal - FPL team of the week
summary: With four weeks remaining in the Fantasy Premier League season, managers must balance finding explosive differentials with maintaining faith in consistent performers. The team of the week features captain Thiago and triple Arsenal coverage.
content: With four weeks left in the FPL season, it is about striking a balance between finding explosive differentials and keeping faith in the consistent performers.

zh.title: 队长蒂亚戈和三倍阿森纳 - 梦幻英超本周最佳阵容
zh.summary: 在梦幻英超赛季还剩四周的情况下，经理们必须平衡寻找爆炸性的差异和对稳定表现者的信心。本周最佳阵容以队长蒂亚戈和三倍阿森纳覆盖为特色。

title: Stiles' son 'disgusted' over FA brain injury claim
summary: Campaigners and the late footballer's son express outrage over the FA's apparent denial of a link between heading a football and brain injuries. The controversy highlights ongoing concerns about player safety in football.
content: Campaigners are disgusted the FA has apparently denied a link between heading the ball and brain injuries.

zh.title: 斯泰尔斯之子对足总脑伤声明"感到厌恶"
zh.summary: 活动人士和已故足球运动员之子对足总明显否认头球与脑伤之间的联系表示愤怒。这场争议突显了人们对足球运动员安全的持续关注。

title: Music & methods - why Forest could be Europa League favourites
summary: Nottingham Forest's recent revival has strengthened their bid for Europa League qualification as they face Aston Villa. The club's improved form has made them potential favorites in the competition's final stages.
content: A recent revival has lifted Nottingham Forest's hopes as they chase their Europa League dream against Aston Villa.

zh.title: 音乐与方法 - 为什么森林队可能成为欧洲联赛杯的热门球队
zh.summary: 诺丁汉森林队最近的复兴加强了他们争取欧洲联赛资格的努力,因为他们将面对阿斯顿维拉队。该俱乐部改善的表现使他们成为比赛最后阶段的潜在热门球队。

title: When Wrexham's first Hollywood season ended in final-game tears
summary: As Wrexham pursue Championship play-off qualification, former player Paul Rutherford reflects on the club's mixed fortunes under Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney ownership. The club's first Hollywood-backed season ended in playoff disappointment despite initial success.
content: As Wrexham aim for the Championship play-offs, ex-player Paul Rutherford recalls it hasn't all been promotion success for Ryan Reynolds and Rob Mac.

zh.title: 雷克瑟姆首个好莱坞赛季在最后一场比赛中以泪水落幕
zh.summary: 在雷克瑟姆追求英冠附加赛资格之际,前球员保罗·鲁瑟福德回顾了该俱乐部在瑞恩·雷诺兹和罗布·麦克埃尔海尼所有权下的起伏。尽管初期取得成功,该俱乐部首个好莱坞支持的赛季以附加赛失望告终。

title: VAR Review: Arsenal's second penalty should've bee...
summary: VAR overturned a penalty decision in Arsenal's Champions League semifinal against Atlético Madrid, with the reviewing process proving controversial in a match that has generated ongoing debate about decision consistency.

zh.title: VAR审查：阿森纳第二个点球本应被推翻
zh.summary: VAR在阿森纳与马德里竞技的欧冠半决赛中推翻了点球判罚，审查过程在这场备受争议的比赛中引起广泛讨论，关于判罚一致性的争议仍在继续。

title: Atléti-Arsenal draw shows that neither team is lik...
summary: Arsenal and Atlético Madrid drew 1-1 in their Champions League semifinal first leg, though both teams displayed attacking limitations compared to their competitors Bayern Munich and PSG. The tie remains competitive heading into the decisive second leg.
content: Arsenal and Atlético Madrid couldn't match Bayern and PSG's attacking firepower, though their UCL semifinal tie remains finely poised.

zh.title: 马竞-阿森纳平局表明两队实力不够突出
zh.summary: 阿森纳和马德里竞技在欧冠半决赛首回合中1-1战平，尽管与拜仁慕尼黑和巴黎圣日耳曼等竞争对手相比，两队在进攻方面都有局限。这个对阵在决定性的次回合前仍然充满悬念。

title: Ranking the top 20 best women's soccer club managers in the world
summary: ESPN has ranked the world's top 20 women's club soccer managers across major leagues including the NWSL, WSL, and Liga F. The ranking provides insight into how coaching talent is distributed across elite women's club competitions globally.
content: ESPN ranks the top 20 women's managers in the club game. Who's No. 1? And how will the NWSL, WSL, Liga F and other leagues be represented?

zh.title: 世界女子足球俱乐部教练top 20排名
zh.summary: ESPN公布了世界顶级20位女子俱乐部足球教练的排名，涵盖NWSL、WSL和西甲女子组等主要联赛。该排名揭示了精英女子俱乐部赛事中教练人才的全球分布情况。

title: Arsenal hit seven to seal Leicester play-off fate
summary: Arsenal routed Leicester City 7-0 in Women's Super League play, mathematically confirming Leicester's bottom-place finish while closing to eight points behind leaders Manchester City with two games remaining.
content: Arsenal close the gap on leaders Manchester City to eight points with two games in hand, after a 7-0 win over Leicester City - who will finish bottom of the Women's Super League.

zh.title: 阿森纳7球完胜莱斯特城 锁定其降级命运
zh.summary: 阿森纳在女超联赛中以7:0大胜莱斯特城，从数学上确认了莱斯特城垫底的命运，同时与领头羊曼城的积分差距缩小至8分，还剩两场比赛
